value.rationale: The claim concerns a specific "Codex guardrails" safety post (dated May 8, 2026) framing Codex adoption as an enterprise control system with sandboxing, approvals, network policy, credentials, and telemetry. The fetched page is the Codex landing/navigation page. While the navigation lists related items such as "Sandboxing," "Permissions," "Agent approvals & security," "Governance," and a general "Guardrails" entry under the Agents SDK, the page does not mention or describe a "Codex guardrails" safety post, nor the May 8, 2026 post or its described control-system framing. The page body only describes Codex's general coding capabilities. There is no verbatim text substantiating the specific claimed offering.
